summary: The diff implements fixes for all three requirements. MusicTheoryApp.tsx introduces separate manualKey and autoDetectedKey state with correct priority logic (manualKey || autoDetectedKey), TheoryPanel.tsx now falls back to locally-generated music theory data when the backend returns null/empty, musicTheory.ts adds client-side generators for chord progressions, scale degree chords, improvisation tips, and composition suggestions. These changes together address REQ-7, REQ-8, and REQ-9.
